hero.headline: Your product, shipped end-to-end.
hero.subline: iOS, Android, web, and backend — built once, properly, with the production patterns we use on real client work. One accountable partner, no hand-off chain.
hero.proof2: 4 open-source apps — inspect the real code
hero.proof3: One client at a time, full focus

home.headline: See the kind of product you could ship
home.subline: Live, interactive previews — built with the same production patterns we ship to clients. Pick a type to explore.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: One partner across the whole product lifecycle — from the first idea to a shipped, maintained product. AI woven in where it earns its place.

strategy.title: Strategy & Scoping
strategy.outcome: We turn a rough idea into a clear, costed plan — scope, architecture, and a realistic roadmap before any code.

build.title: Design & Build
build.outcome: Mobile, web, and backend built once and properly — production patterns, automated tests, and AI used to ship faster without cutting corners.

launch.title: Launch & Iterate
launch.outcome: We ship to the stores and the web, set up CI/CD and monitoring, then keep improving based on real usage.

engagement.fullDesc: We own delivery end-to-end — you get a finished, maintained product and one point of contact.
engagement.embeddedDesc: Need extra senior firepower? We join your team and ship alongside your engineers.

services.existing: Already have a product? We also take over, stabilise and extend it — rescue legacy code, reduce crashes, ship new features — not only greenfield builds.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: Transparent, time-boxed, and low-risk — you can see where your money and your product stand at each milestone.

phase1.title: Scope & plan
phase1.detail: We turn your brief into a build-ready plan — scope, a fixed price, and a date — set out in a written proposal before you commit to a build.

phase2.title: Build in the open
phase2.detail: Demos at real milestones, direct access to the engineer building it, and open-source showcases you can inspect before you hire — no account-manager relay.

phase3.title: Ship & support
phase3.detail: We release, set up monitoring, and stay on to fix and improve — the product doesn't get abandoned at handover.

process.principle1: A working build at each planned milestone

riskReversal.title: On time and on budget — as agreed in your proposal
riskReversal.body: We agree scope, price, and delivery date in a written proposal before a line of code. You review a working build at each planned milestone, and own everything at release — no lock-in, the code's yours in open repos.

proof.title: Read the code before you hire us
proof.subtitle: Most studios' code is closed. Ours is open. These are full, production-grade showcase apps — explore the architecture, the tests, and the commit history yourself.
proof.inspectLine: Clean architecture · automated tests · CI/CD · full commit history — all public on GitHub.
proof.references: Client work is under NDA — verified references are available on request.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: We're early and selective, and most of our work is under NDA.
testimonials.placeholder: Verified references are available on request.

about.title: The partner you actually work with
about.para1: MK Digital is a senior-led product partner — built on 8+ years delivering production apps across fintech, payments and healthcare in the UK, Ireland and the EU.
about.para2: Senior engineering applied directly to your product: one accountable partner from first idea to launch, no hand-off chain. The code is clean and public, so you own everything — no lock-in.

contact.headline: Have a product to build — or improve?
contact.subline: Tell us what you're building. We usually reply within 24 hours — often with first questions and a sense of scope.
contact.company: MK Digital s. r. o. · Banská Bystrica, Slovakia

scope.label: Estimated scope
scope.hint: A rough scope from your selection — the exact scope and a fixed price come from a short discovery call and a written spec, never an instant number.

home.hasDocBenefit: Send it over — or we'll go through it on the discovery call.
home.hasDocMail: Client has their own documentation / spec.

hero.headline: Senior-led, fintech-grade, accountable.
hero.subline: Behind MK Digital is Miroslav Kušnír, a senior engineer with 8+ years shipping production apps as Head of Mobile and lead engineer across fintech, payments and healthcare in the UK, Ireland and the EU. One accountable partner from first idea to launch — and the same standards are public in the open-source apps below: inspect the architecture, tests and commit history before you hire.
hero.exp1: Head of Mobile & lead engineer · 8+ years
hero.company: MK Digital s. r. o. · Banská Bystrica, Slovakia · Company ID 55 450 229 — one accountable partner from first contact to launch.

why.title: Why one senior partner
why.subtitle: A single accountable engineer removes the overhead, hand-offs and finger-pointing that slow a multi-team agency down.

coordination.title: Zero coordination tax
coordination.body: Every extra person multiplies the conversations that must stay in sync — an eight-person team carries 28 before a line of code. With MK Digital that overhead simply isn't there — it becomes your speed.

translation.title: Nothing lost in translation
translation.body: The same senior owns your backend, mobile and web — so the seams that usually break in the hand-off between teams never exist here.

accountability.title: One name on the line
accountability.body: Responsibility can be shared. Accountability can't. You get one accountable partner across the whole build — no backend-vs-frontend finger-pointing.

directLine.title: A direct line
directLine.body: No account manager, no PM relay. One line between your decision and your product.

continuity.title: No hand-off chain — you hold every key
continuity.body: Bus factor isn't about team size — a 20-person agency where one architect holds the knowledge is just as exposed. You own everything you've paid for — the repo, infrastructure and credentials are handed over with clean architecture and documentation complete enough for any senior to continue tomorrow. No lock-in isn't a promise — it's an architecture you can read in the open repos.

showcases.subtitle: Production patterns we ship — explore the source.
